hook.summary: A woman displays her clear skin alongside inset photos of her previous acne struggles while introducing a skincare product.
hook.visual_action: Close-up of a woman's face with clear skin, with two smaller inset photos showing skin with acne and redness.
hook.text_overlay:
透明感ある肌目指す元ニキビ肌ママ
よくみるコレ ニキビ※1美白※2までケアできるの知ってた？
hook.voiceover_transcript: よくみるコレ、ニキビ美白までケアできるの知ってた？

scene_flow: Hook: Comparison of current clear skin vs. past acne-prone skin with product introduction.
Product application: Showing the texture of the milk and applying it to the face.
Ingredient highlight: Explaining the 'Red CICA' component and its potency compared to regular CICA.
Brand reveal: Showing the full N organic product line and expressing satisfaction.
Offer/CTA: Displaying the trial set price and a call to action.
